geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for West zone; covers Rajajinagar (all blocks), Malleshwaram, Basaveshwara Nagar, Vijayanagar

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 estimates; larger household size reflects multigenerational traditional families; literacy from Karnataka DISE 2021-22

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban Karnataka; Malleshwaram/Rajajinagar income profile reflects traditional middle class — government employees, shopkeepers, educators; informal rate includes market vendors from ILO India Employment Report 2024

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Green Line ridership data 2024; DULT CMP 2020; short commute distances due to central-west location with good road connectivity; car ownership from RTO data 2023

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Moderate fare sensitivity for middle income; high political mobilisation — traditional Kannada-speaking base with strong civic identity (Rajkumar riots origin zone); loss aversion moderate — property-owning stable middle class; from Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: High clustering from multigenerational neighborhood ties — Malleshwaram one of oldest planned localities (1898); strong caste and community network overlays; from IHDS-II urban social network patterns

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Malleshwaram 8th Cross and Sampige Road — iconic commercial street; BBMP trade license data 2023; footfall from BMTC/BMRCL station data
Rajajinagar commercial complex and surrounding market area; BBMP street vendor survey 2022
Gandhi Bazaar — historic market specialising in flowers, vegetables, traditional goods; BBMP heritage market data 2023; serves Basavanagudi and surrounding residential areas

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL Green Line 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BMTC 2023, BBMP 2023, RTO Bangalore Urban 2023
